text:
is a product published by MOVIC in March 2009.

Overview

It features the Major Arcana deck of cards, it comes with instruction booklets describing more information about it.

THE FOOL 0: Rei Ayanami
THE MAGICIAN I: Ritsuko Akagi
THE HIGH PRIESTESS II: Yui Ikari
THE EMPRESS III: Asuka Shikinami Langley
THE EMPEROR IV: Gendo Ikari
THE HIEROPHANT V: Kaworu Nagisa
THE LOVERS VI: Hikari Horaki & Tōji Suzuhara
THE CHARIOT VII: Evangelion Unit-01
STRENGHT VIII: Second Angel Lilith
THE HERMIT IX: SEELE
WHEEL OF FORTUNE X: Tree of Life
JUSTICE XI: Shinji Ikari
THE HANGED MAN XII: Ryoji Kaji
DEATH XIII: Kaworu Nagisa
TEMPERANCE XIV: Maya Ibuki
THE DEVIL XV: Evangelion Unit-01
THE TOWER XVI: Tokyo-3
THE STAR XVII: Rei Ayanami
THE MOON XVIII: Kaworu Nagisa
THE SUN XIX: Misato Katsuragi
JUDGEMENT XX: Magi
THE WORLD XXI: Lilith

Staff

Art Direction & Illustration: Youichi Fukano (c.p.tom's)
Design Works & Finish: Nobutsune Tanaka (PRODUCT-N2)
Publisher: MOVIC
